# terrible_cisco_meraki_devices_switch_routing_interfaces (Resource)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this task against

### Optional

- `async_seconds` (Number) Run the task asynchronously, timing out after this many seconds. 0 = synchronous (default).
- `changed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered changed (e.g. 'false').
- `defaultGateway` (String) The next hop for any traffic that isn't going to a directly connected subnet or over a static route. This IP address must exist in a subnet with a L3 interface. Required if this is the first IPv4 interface.
- `delegate_to_id` (String) ID of another terrible_host to delegate execution to.
- `environment` (String) Environment variables set for the task (dict of nameâ†’value).
- `failed_when` (String) Jinja2 expression that overrides when the task is considered failed.
- `ignore_errors` (Boolean) When true, a failed task does not raise a Terraform error.
- `interfaceId` (String) InterfaceId path parameter. Interface ID.
- `interfaceIp` (String) The IP address that will be used for Layer 3 routing on this VLAN or subnet. This cannot be the same as the device management IP.
- `ipv6` (String) The IPv6 settings of the interface.
- `loopback` (String) The loopback settings of the interface.
- `mode` (String) L3 Interface mode, can be one of 'vlan', 'routed', 'loopback'. Default is 'vlan'. CS 17.18 or higher is required for 'routed' mode.
- `multicastRouting` (String) Enable multicast support if, multicast routing between VLANs is required. Options are 'disabled', 'enabled' or 'IGMP snooping querier'. Default is 'disabled'.
- `name` (String) A friendly name or description for the interface or VLAN (max length 128 characters).
- `ospfSettings` (String) The OSPF routing settings of the interface.
- `poll_interval` (Number) Polling interval in seconds when async_seconds > 0. Defaults to 15.
- `serial` (String) Serial path parameter.
- `skip_tags` (String) Skip tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `subnet` (String) The network that this L3 interface is on, in CIDR notation (ex. 10.1.1.0/24).
- `switchPortId` (String) Switch Port ID when in Routed mode (CS 17.18 or higher required).
- `tags` (String) Run only tasks with these Ansible tags (list of strings).
- `timeout` (Number) Override the default execution timeout (seconds). Defaults to 300.
- `triggers` (String) Arbitrary map of values; any change triggers task re-execution
- `vlanId` (Number) The VLAN this L3 interface is on. VLAN must be between 1 and 4094.
- `vrf` (String) The VRF settings of the interface. Requires IOS XE 17.18 or higher.

### Read-Only

- `changed` (Boolean) Whether the task reported a change
- `id` (String) Unique task resource ID
- `meraki_response` (String) A dictionary or list with the response returned by the Cisco Meraki Python SDK
